## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify` (lint -> typecheck -> module ratchet -> tests -> docs sync)
- [ ] Relevant numerical oracle/property test added or updated
- [ ] Browser/build/standalone checks run when applicable
- [ ] Generated evidence was produced by scripts, not hand-edited

## Public surface

- [ ] API and serialized-schema compatibility considered
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated when user-visible
- [ ] No secrets, private datasets, or machine-specific artifacts included
